title: DNA extraction from insect gut-dwelling fungi
author: Yan Wang

steps.title: Suspend fungal thalli and spores in a 1
steps.instruction: Suspend fungal thalli and spores in a 1.5 mL centrifuge tube with 2x CTAB buffer ( 200 µL ).

steps.title: Freeze and thaw the sample three...
steps.instruction: Freeze and thaw the sample three times by submerging the tube into liquid nitrogen and incubating it at 65 °C using a heat block.

steps.title: After the final thaw, crush the...
steps.instruction: After the final thaw, crush the fungal tissues using a disposable pellet pestle (for 1.5 mL microtube).

steps.title: Cool the sample for 00:01:00 On ice
steps.instruction: Cool the sample for 00:01:00 On ice .

steps.title: Add 4 µL Proteinase K 20...
steps.instruction: Add 4 µL Proteinase K 20 mg/mL to the tube and mix them by inverting the tube three times.

steps.title: Warm the tube at 65 °C...
steps.instruction: Warm the tube at 65 °C for 00:30:00 using a heat block.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12000 x g, Room...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12000 x g, Room temperature, 2 minutes and transfer the supernatant to a new tube.

steps.title: Add Chloroform
steps.instruction: Add Chloroform: Isoamyl alcohol (24:1) with an equal volume of the supernatant.

steps.title: Shake the mixture slowly for 00:10:00...
steps.instruction: Shake the mixture slowly for 00:10:00 on a rotator and leave the tube on the rack for 00:02:00 at room temperature.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13000 x g, Room...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13000 x g, Room temperature, 4 minutes and transfer the top layer to another tube with wide-bore tips, avoiding breaking DNAs.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a new...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a new tube and repeat steps 8-10.

steps.title: Add 4 µL RNase A (...
steps.instruction: Add 4 µL RNase A ( 10 mg/mL ) and incubate at 37 °C for 00:40:00 .

steps.title: Add Isopropanol ( stored at -20...
steps.instruction: Add Isopropanol ( stored at -20 °C ) with a 66% volume of the product from the last step and mix by inversion.

steps.title: Leave the tube at 4 °C...
steps.instruction: Leave the tube at 4 °C for at least 05:00:00 (or overnight) until fully precipitated.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13000 x g, Room...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13000 x g, Room temperature, 10 minutes with the cap opening side pointing to the centrifuge center.

steps.title: Immediately dump the supernatant and transfer...
steps.instruction: Immediately dump the supernatant and transfer the tube (with the cap open & upside down) on the paper towel to absorb the remaining supernatant.

steps.title: Leave the cap open on rack
steps.instruction: Leave the cap open on rack.

steps.title: Add 150 µL 70% ethanol (stored...
steps.instruction: Add 150 µL 70% ethanol (stored at -20 °C ) to the tube.

steps.title: Cap it and use the finger...
steps.instruction: Cap it and use the finger to tap the tube gently.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute .

steps.title: Repeat step 16
steps.instruction: Repeat step 16.

steps.title: Leave the tube at 37 °C...
steps.instruction: Leave the tube at 37 °C with the cap open and a piece of Kimwipe paper on top for 00:30:00 or until the DNA becomes dry.

steps.title: Add 50 µL H 2 O...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL H 2 O to the dried DNA in the tube and wait for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Pipette and store the DNA in...
steps.instruction: Pipette and store the DNA in the tube at -20 °C .
